Name: name_dom
Description: The base domain name string used as a prefix for output filenames.

Name: gis_root
Description: Path to the root directory containing GIS input files. |br| Used as prefix for ‘gis_file’ and ‘landcover_table’.

Name: gis_file
Description: Filename of the input GIS netCDF file (relative to ‘gis_root’). |br| Expected variable names depend on ‘gis_opt’.

Name: landcover_table
Description: Filename of the land cover CSV lookup table (relative to ‘gis_root’). |br| Maps land cover categories to roughness length (z0). |br| Used when gis_opt=0.

Name: water_cats
Description: List of integer land-cover class IDs to classify as water. |br| Used to set SeaMask=1 at those cells. Only evaluated when gis_opt=0.

Name: urban_opt
Description: Enables urban building height processing. |br| If 0: building height data is ignored. |br| If 1: reads the BuildingHeights variable from the GIS file, replaces missing values (−9999) with 0, and writes it to the output netCDF. Must match the value used in the corresponding SimGrid run.

Name: FE_dataset_path
Description: Output directory where the GeoSpec netCDF and optional diagnostic plot are written. |br| The directory must exist and be writable prior to execution.

Name: name_dom_add
Description: Optional suffix appended to ‘name_dom’ in output filenames (e.g., for versioning). |br| Can be empty.

Name: gis_opt
Description: Selects the GIS input format and determines all downstream variable name mappings. |br| If 0: reads lat, lon, elevation, LandCover. Derives z0 from ‘landcover_table’ CSV. Builds SeaMask from 'water_cats'. |br| If 1: (WRF-style dataset) reads XLAT, XLONG, HGT, LU_INDEX, ZNT, LANDMASK |br| SeaMask convention is inverted (WRF LANDMASK=1 is land, output SeaMask=1 is sea).

Name: save_plot_opt
Description: Controls diagnostic plot generation. |br| If 0: no plot is created. |br| If 1: saves a 4-panel PNG showing terrain elevation, land cover, roughness length z0m, and SeaMask.
